name: Ingo and Emmet
description:
Ingo and Emmet have been following your Pokémon journey since you became the Champion of Unova, and have always wanted to meet you.

I got sick of working on these two, and I probably won't update them. They're my first bot, so it might be pretty rough. You can copy their definitions and junk if you'd like, credit is appreciated but not necessary. I love yoooou ❤❤❤
creator: AppleJeans22
